phases.name: Phase 1: Foundation
phases.description: Data models, configuration, and system prompt -- no interdependencies

phases.name: Phase 2: Core components
phases.description: Components that depend only on Phase 1 outputs (models, config, prompts dir)

phases.name: Phase 3: Generation logic
phases.description: Generator depends on client (05) and prompt builder (04) from Phase 2

phases.name: Phase 4: Integration
phases.description: Orchestrator and tests depend on all previous components
